content:
## Summary Notes

- # CodeVoir AI Learning Agent This module powers the source-grounded learning workflow inside CodeVoir.
- It supports: - PDF upload and page-level indexing.
- Local deterministic embeddings for zero-cost retrieval.
- RAG chat with source citations and confidence labels.
- Notes, summaries, cheatsheets, flashcards, interview questions, revision plans, project pitches, and mindmaps.
